title: Sucat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sucat with a Z-Score of +3.54, indicating extreme temperatures. The city is experiencing a CRITICAL level heat wave with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sucat are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 76% and a Vento of 2.8 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a CDD of 11.4 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating demand, and the focus is on mitigating the effects of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
